login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your DueCircle account

errors.accountLocked: Your account has been locked. Contact support.
errors.orgSuspended: This organization account has been suspended.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link
forgotPassword.successMessage: We've sent a password reset link to {{email}}

resetPassword.title: Set new password

resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been changed. You can now sign in.

errors.tokenExpired: This reset link has expired. Please request a new one.
errors.passwordTooWeak: Password must be at least 8 characters with a number and special character

signup.subtitle: Set up DueCircle for your business

acceptInvite.subtitle: {{inviterName}} invited you to join {{orgName}}
acceptInvite.expired: This invitation has expired or already been used.

sessionTimeout.warningMessage: You'll be logged out in {{minutes}} minutes due to inactivity.

validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
